payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial right-edge view of a dark reddish-brown wooden side table with a rectangular, cabinet-like form, paneled front and molded base; glossy finish with visible scuffs and light wear, edge-cropped in the image and positioned next to a tufted leather armchair — appears roughly 0.8 m from the camera.
